summary: Full MVP backend + frontend tested. 15/15 pytest backend tests pass covering /api/difficulties, /api/levels, /api/level, /api/profile/init|sync, /api/ads/reward, /api/shop/packs, /api/checkout/create|status (incl. negative cases). Frontend critical paths all functional on mobile viewport 390x844: home (title 'Dot Link', play button, 250 coins), worlds (Lumina unlocked, Aurora/Zenith/Eclipse/Void locked with hint message), levels grid (level-lumina-1 unlocked), game screen (4x4 grid, dots rendered, reset/hint/reward buttons), shop (4 packs + reward video), settings (3 toggles). Stripe checkout: POST /api/checkout/create succeeds, opens real Stripe popup (cs_test_*), polling banner appears and GET /api/checkout/status polls correctly. Mock reward ad credited coins (250 -> 300 observed in topbar). Console warnings detected (non-blocking): 'shadow*' style props deprecated and 'pointerEvents' prop deprecated — react-native-web migration nags. Game completion via simulated drag was NOT executed (gesture simulation on web is fragile); main agent should verify visually.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow' instead. Triggered on home, shop, settings, worlds screens (likely from shadowColor/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius used in styles in index.tsx, worlds.tsx, etc.).
Warning: props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents. Coming from gesture/blur libs or own components.

action_items: Optional: migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow on web (or wrap in Platform.select) to clear console warnings.
Optional: replace `pointerEvents` prop with `style={{ pointerEvents }}` to silence deprecation warning.

Manual visual check: drag-to-solve flow on /game/lumina/1 (gesture engine) — automated drag simulation was skipped as it is web-unreliable; please verify victory overlay 'Niveau Résolu' triggers with stars when grid is 100% filled.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: logger is used inside create_checkout (line 250) before being defined (line 401). Works at runtime due to module load order but it's fragile — move the logging.basicConfig + logger = getLogger to the top of the file.
server.py uses @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI/Starlette; consider switching to lifespan handlers in a future iteration.
Frontend env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Tests use it via env override — keep consistent across docs.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (all nav + checkout + settings + reward credit verified; gameplay drag-to-solve not auto-tested)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ device_id profiles via /api/profile/init (auto-cleanable, prefixed TEST_).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend stable. Stripe in test mode returns cs_test_* sessions; opening URL works. To test full payment success, automate Stripe Checkout fill of card 4242 4242 4242 4242 then return to /checkout-return — polling endpoint already idempotently credits coins. For game completion test, fetch /api/level/lumina/1?include_solution=true and simulate mouse down→move→up across cells of each color path on [data-testid="game-grid"]. Use mobile viewport 390x844.
